source_metadata.title: 2026/03/04 - EW [Part 1]
source_metadata.description:
Wednesday 4 March 2026 | Education and Workforce Committee

Briefing on the 2024/25 performance, current operations, and strategic intentions of Immigration New Zealand

Hearing of evidence:

Ministry of Business, Innovation and Employment
   Nic Blakeley, Chief Executive and Secretary for Economic Growth
   Alison McDonald, Deputy Secretary Immigration
   Siân Roguski, General Manager Employment, Skills and Immigration Policy
   Polly Vowles, Manager Immigration (Skills and Residence) Policy
   Stacey O’Dowd, Manager Immigration (Border & Funding) Policy
   Sam Foley, Manager Immigration (International & Humanitarian) Policy
   Steve Watson, General Manager Immigration Compliance and Investigations
   Fiona Whiteridge, General Manager Refugee and Migrant Services
   Karen Bishop, General Manager Future Services
   Jeannie Melville, Deputy Chief Operating Officer Immigration
   Duncan Connor, National Manager Occupational Regulation
   Lester Deane-Royce, Principal Advisor
